meaning: n.(美国) 加利福尼亚理工学院
examples: He recently received a letter from a parent of a toddler wanting to know where the child needs to go in order to get accepted at Caltech.
Tom Tromey graduated from Caltech in 1990.
Credit: Phoenix Mission Team, NASA, JPL-Caltech, U. Arizona.
Previous Caltech faculty members include 33 Nobel laureates and visiting professors Albert Einstein and Stephen Hawking.
"You know the great scientists by the problems they pick to work on, " says Caltech's Lewis.
